mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (id, username, password, email, phone, role, status, register_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{status}, #{registerTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, role, status, register_time, last_login_time, create_time, update_time FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, role, status, register_time, last_login_time, create_time, update_time FROM t_user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, role, status, register_time, last_login_time, create_time, update_time FROM t_user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_user SET email = #{email}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_user SET phone = #{phone}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_user SET password = #{password}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_user SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
